extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard won from a 32-rider breakaway after attacking on the final 20km climb to Peñas Blancas, beating SOLER by 9 seconds.
tactical_patterns: 32-rider breakaway established early on 119km stage with single finish climb, GC teams allowed complete gap.
Quick-Step isolated Evenepoel with zero teammates in break while UAE planted three riders including Soler.
Kelderman gained 14+ GC places by infiltrating massive break as highest-placed GC rider at stage start.
Rodriguez collapsed in final 300m with visible hip hematoma from earlier crash, losing GC ground unexpectedly.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: First Vuelta stage win after disappointing Giro shows he's stage-hunting not GC, confidence restored
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: Third place finish and UAE's three-rider break representation confirms team prioritizing stage hunting over GC
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: Tactical masterstroke entering break as highest GC rider, jumped to 6th overall from outside top-20
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: Hip hematoma from crash caused collapse in final 300m, serious inflammation threatening weekend mountain stages
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Quick-Step's zero representation in 32-rider break shows team isolation after losing Vine domestique
